reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 동결건조로 된 생선 종류를 항상 쟁여두고 먹였는데 (바잇미 원형통에 들어있는) 이번엔 이걸로 처음 주문해봤어요 냄새가 뭔가.. 요거트 냄새? 같은 게 나요 채소, 과일, 생선 조합이라 너무 좋아요 저녁에 간식으로 비오바이츠 트릿을 주었는데 아주 잘먹어요 동결건조 계란노른자랑 같이 물에 불려 주었어요!! 유산균과 유신균 먹이가 같이 있는 신바이오틱스라니! 패키지도 너무 귀엽고 손이 가요 힛 ᵔᴥᵔ 그릇을 뚝딱 다 비웠어요!
reviews.content_en: I've always kept freeze-dried fish treats on hand (the kind in BITE ME's round containers), but this was my first time ordering this one. It has a weird smell... kind of like yogurt? I really love the combination of vegetables, fruits, and fish. I gave my pet BIO BITES treats as an evening snack, and they ate it so well! I soaked the freeze-dried egg yolk together in water!! It's a synbiotic with both probiotics and beneficial bacteria! The packaging is so cute too 🐶 My pet finished the whole bowl!

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content:
기호성도 볼겸 유산균이라써져있어 잘못먹이면 설사할까봐 샘플로 샀는데 고양이,강아지 다 좋아하네용 !!!(북어,연어 모두 구매했을때 둘다 좋아하긴하는데 저희애들은 북어에 선호도가 더 높았습니다😳 이건 아이들마다 다를 수 있으니깐요 ㅎㅎ)
지금 바잇미 특가 할인하고 있어 바로 구매!!했습니다.
샘플은 한봉에 6~8개씩 들어있는것같아요 사이즈가 작아서 여행용으로 들고 다니기 좋은크기라서 몇번은 살것같은데 샘플치고는 가격이 좀 있는편인것같아요...ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I bought a sample because I was worried about diarrhea since it says probiotics, and I wanted to check the taste preference, but both cats and dogs love it!!! (I bought both anchovy and salmon, and they both like them, but my kids prefer the anchovy more 😳 This can vary from pet to pet ㅎㅎ) Since BITE ME is on sale right now, I bought it right away!! The sample seems to have about 6-8 pieces per package. The size is small, so it's a good size for travel, and I think I'll buy it again a few times, but for a sample, the price seems a bit high... ㅠ

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content:
일단 커버가 너무 예뻐서 사진 찍을맛이 나는거 같아요!
기호성은 제품 깠는데 너무 맛있는 냄새나서 맛이 없을수가 없는거 같고,
애기가 장이 많이 예민한편이라서 간식 골라 먹이는데 비오바이츠는 탈없이 잘 먹었어요!
유산균도 들어있다고 해서 기호성이랑 장기능 두마리 토끼 잡을 수 있지 않을까 라는 기대로 먹이고 있고 앞으로도 꾸준히 구매하려구요!
reviews.content_en: First of all, the cover is so pretty that it makes me want to take photos! When I opened the product, it smelled so delicious that it seems impossible for it not to taste good. My baby has a sensitive stomach, so I'm picky about which treats I give, but BIO BITES was eaten without any issues! Since it has probiotics, I'm hoping to catch two birds with one stone - both taste preference and digestive health - and I plan to keep buying it consistently!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
우선 트릿이 작아요 ~ 백원짜리 동전과 비교샷 !
아이한테 두가지 다 먹여보고 냄새 맡게 하고 두개 기호성 체크
연어를 더 좋아라 하네요  ^^   작아서 여러번 주기 좋고 동결건조에
유산균까지 들어있어 너무 만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: First, the treats are small~ Here's a comparison shot with a one-hundred-won coin! I fed both types to my pet, let them smell them, and checked their taste preferences. They prefer salmon ^^ Since they're small, it's nice to give them multiple times, and I'm very satisfied that they're freeze-dried AND contain probiotics!

reviews.name: 옹****
reviews.content: 강아지들 잘먹는단 후기들만 많아서 걱정반 기대반 구입했는데 다행히 입짧은 울 냥이들도 잘먹네요 변비 있는 둘째 먹이려고 구입했는데 효과 있었으면 좋겠네요
reviews.content_en: There were only reviews saying dogs eat them well, so I bought it with half worry and half hope, and thankfully my picky cats eat them too! I bought it hoping it would help with my second cat's constipation, so I hope it works.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 넘 맛있게 잘먹어요 유산균 포함되어있다고 해서 간식겸 일석이조💛
reviews.content_en: My pet eats it SO deliciously! Since it contains probiotics, it's a two-for-one deal - a treat AND digestive support 💛

reviews.name: 설****
reviews.content: 티니트릿 품절이라 샀는데ㅠ 유산균도 들어있고 사이즈도 작아서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it because the Tiny Treats were out of stock ㅠ I like that it has probiotics and the size is small too!

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content: 요즘 삼둥이 최애간식! 골고루 줄 수 있고 너무 잘먹어서 안떨어지게 구비해두고있어요
reviews.content_en: My triplets' new favorite treat lately! I can give it to all of them equally, and they eat it so well that I always keep it stocked!

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
울코코 입이 짧고 간식도 편식이 있어 여러가지 못먹는 경우가 많아요ㅠ 
구입을 해도 먹지 않을까하는 걱정반 욕구반 생각만하다가 마침 세일을 해서 구입했어요^^
걱정은 뒤로- 바이오바이츠(salmon)너무잘먹어요~~
다른 맛도 구입해야겠어요🫶🫶
reviews.content_en: My Coco has a picky palate and doesn't eat many treats because of her food preferences ㅠ I kept hesitating between worry and wanting to try, but I finally bought it when there was a sale ^^ No need to worry - Bio Bites (salmon) tastes SO good!! I need to buy the other flavors too 🫶🫶

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 토이사니 사은품으로 딸려왔는데 아이가 잘먹어서 구매했어요 큰용량이 가성비는 좋겠지만 소포장이 편할것같아서 작은걸로 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: It came as a gift with a toy toy purchase, but since my pet ate it well, I bought it. The larger size would be better value, but I thought smaller packaging would be more convenient, so I bought the smaller one!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
양은 적은데 다른 연어트릿 더 연어스러워요
냄새도 그렇고..그래선지 정말 너무 잘먹어서 순식간에 사라져요
reviews.content_en: The amount is small, but it smells more like salmon compared to other salmon treats... Because of that, my pup eats it SO well and it disappears in no time!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
포장 뜯자마자 생선간식 특유의 냄새가 훅!
엄청 잘 먹어요😛
reviews.content_en: As soon as I opened the package, that signature fishy treat smell hit! 🐟 My dog eats it like crazy😛

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
샘플용으로 구매했었는데 너무 잘먹고 
사료에 으깨서 뿌려줬더니 사료도 좀 먹고
그래서 좀 비사지만 본품으로 구매햇어용
사료는 빼고 안먹을땨도 있지만 그래도 좋아하니 다행이예용
reviews.content_en: I originally bought it as a sample and my pup loved it so much. I crushed some and sprinkled it on their kibble and they ate a bit of that too. It's a bit pricey, so I hesitated, but I ended up buying the full size because they enjoy it so much. Sometimes they leave the kibble and won't eat it, but since they still like this treat, I'm happy about it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
밥 위에 토핑을 올려주면 좋아해서 샘플을 구입해봤는데
아주 잘먹습니다ㅋㅋ 완전 흡족
reviews.content_en: When I put it as a topping on their food, they love it, so I tried buying a sample and they eat it really well ㅋㅋ Totally satisfied!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 노즈워크에.딱이라 매번 구매하고 있어요 냄새도 좋고 사이즈도 딱이라 너무 잘 먹이고 있어요 또 구매하러 올게요
reviews.content_en: It's perfect for nose work games, so I keep buying it every time. The smell is great and the size is just right, so my pup loves it. I'll be back to buy more!

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 요 유산균 트릿 산책 갈때 들고가기 편하고 열자마자 냄새가 너무 좋아요 노즈워크.하기도 좋고 애기가.잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: These probiotic treats are convenient to carry on walks, and as soon as you open them the smell is amazing! They're great for nose work games too, and my baby eats them really well 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
특가로 떠서 한번 구입해봤는데
지금까지 사본 유산균중에 정말 기호성 최고네요.
아이 변도 좋아졌구요.
이제 특가 끝나서 아쉽지만 바잇미가 좋은 제품 많이
만드네요.
자주자주 올게요♥♥♥
reviews.content_en: I bought it on sale just to try, and honestly it has the best palatability of any probiotic treats I've bought so far. My pup's digestion has improved too. It's a shame the sale ended, but BITE ME makes lots of great products. I'll be back often ♥♥♥

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
아직 3개월 조금 안된 애기라 트릿은 처음 먹여보는데 다행히 너무 좋아해요 ! 눈물자국이 조금 있어서 육류는 피해서 간식으로 줄만한걸 찾다가 맛보기용이 있어서 주문했는데 본제품으로 구매해도 될거같아요 :) 단점은 먹고나면 강아지입에서 특유의
비릿한 향이 조금 난다는거..! 저희 강아지는 양치시켜주면 그만이라 만족스럽습니다 🥰
reviews.content_en: My baby is just under 3 months old, so this is their first treat experience, and thankfully they love it! Since they have some tear staining, I was looking for a non-meat snack option, and I saw there was a sample size so I ordered it. I think I'll get the full size next! The only downside is that after eating, there's a slight fishy smell from their mouth...! But my pup is fine once I brush their teeth, so I'm satisfied 🥰

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 웰컴딜로 저렴하게 구매했어요.유통기한 넉넉해서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I bought it cheaply with the welcome deal. The expiration date is far away so that's great!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 크기도작고 노즈워크에도좋코 유산균이라 더 좋으네요먹고재주문해야겠어요
reviews.content_en: The size is small and it's great for nose work games, plus it has probiotics so it's even better. I need to reorder after they finish!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 앗 생각보다 양은적었는데 샘플로먹이기엔 좋네요! 작은 트릿인데 물에 으깨서 주니까 잘먹어요! 음수량 높이기에 좋아여!
reviews.content_en: Oh, there's less quantity than I expected, but it's perfect for sampling! It's a small treat and my pup eats it well when I mash it in water! Great for increasing water intake! 💧

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 냄새가 너무 꼬릿해서 ??였는데 강쥐들은 환장..ㅋㅋ 재구매합니다. 바삭거리는데 동결하고는 또다른 느낌이에요
reviews.content_en: The smell is pretty strong 😅 but the dogs go crazy for it..lol 😂 Repurchasing! It's crispy as is, but freezing it gives it a totally different texture!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
진짜잘먹어요 ㅎㅎ연어라서
눈물도안터지고좋아요
꾸준히종종사서 줍니다~입에맞나봐요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup really loves it 😄 Since it's salmon, there's no upset stomach which is great! I keep buying it regularly~ Seems to be just right for her taste 😄

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
입 짧은 딸 강아지가 연어를 좋아해서 사줬는데, 아주 좋아한다고하네요
사료에 부숴주니 잘 먹더래요
reviews.content_en: My picky daughter's pup loves salmon, so I got her some and she absolutely adores it! She eats it really well when I crumble it into her kibble 😊

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
처음구매하는게 많이살껄 1개만 삿네요
내용도좋고 애기가 잘먹어서 훈련용으로 최고에요^^
reviews.content_en: First time buying and I wish I'd gotten more - I only got 1! The quality is great and my baby eats it so well, it's perfect for training! 😊

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content: 간식처럼 먹이기 좋아요. 노즈워크하기 좋은 크기에요. 감사합니다💛
reviews.content_en: Great to feed as a treat! Perfect size for nose work activities. Thank you! 💛

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 친한친구네 강아지가 나이가 많이 들어서 말랑하고 몸에 좋은걸로 구매. 했습니다 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: My friend's senior dog is getting older so I got something soft and healthy for him 😊

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content: 보관쉽고 유산균간식이라 안심하고 먹여요 ㅎㅎ 재구매 하러 오겟습니다 다먹우먼
reviews.content_en: Easy to store and since it's a probiotic treat, I feel confident feeding it 😄 Will be back to repurchase once it's all gone!

reviews.name: m****
reviews.content: 어디 놀러다닐때 갖고다니기 딱 좋아요! 다른맛으로 두개샀어요 너무 잘 먹어요
reviews.content_en: Perfect to take along when going out! I bought two different flavors and my pup loves them so much!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
강아지들이 좋아합니다
작아서 주기도 편하네요~
reviews.content_en: The dogs really love it! It's small so it's easy to give them 😊

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 울강아지 너무좋아하는 유산균트릿이어요..유산균성분이라 믿고 먹습니다.
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely loves these probiotic treats! I feel confident giving them because they contain probiotics.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
뭔가하고 주문했는데 완전 잘먹어서 본품으로 구매했어용
포장도 넘 귀엽
reviews.content_en: I ordered a sample and my dog loved it so much that I bought the full product! 🐕 The packaging is also super cute.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
할인하길래 저렴하게 잘 구매했어요~~ 
아주 잘 먹네요~^^
reviews.content_en: I got a great deal with the discount! 😊 My dog is eating really well~^^

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content:
잘 부서지는 식감이라 걱정없이 먹일수 있어요
잘 먹고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: The texture crumbles nicely so I can feed it without worry. My dog is enjoying it~

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 궁금해서 샘플 이것저것 사봤는데 포장지도 너무 귀엽고 무엇보다도 저희 강아지가 잘 먹네용 ㅎㅎ지금 먹는거 다 먹고 나중에 본품 사줘도 잘 먹을 것 같아용
reviews.content_en: I was curious so I ordered a few different samples and not only is the packaging adorable, but most importantly my pup loves eating them! 😄 Once we finish what we have now, I'm definitely planning to buy the full product!

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 아이들이 잘먹네요. 세일하면 재구매의사  있습니다.
reviews.content_en: The kids love it. I'd consider repurchasing if there's a sale.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
시루가 진짜 좋아하는 트릿이예요~
치즈냄새 솔솔~
reviews.content_en: Siru really loves these treats! 🐕 You can smell the cheesy aroma~

reviews.content: 본 리뷰는 바잇미 서포터즈 바잇미식가의 SNS 포토 후기 입니다. (출처: @lovely__robin__ )
reviews.content_en: This review is from BITE ME supporter @lovely__robin__'s SNS photo review. (Source: @lovely__robin__ )

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 바삭바삭 식감에 강아지가 넘 조아하고 잘먹어여
reviews.content_en: My dog loves the crispy texture and eats them so well!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 칭찬간식으로 아주 좋습니다.잘 먹습니다.
reviews.content_en: Great for praise treats. My dog loves eating them.

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 잘 먹어서 좋고 소분되어 있어 조아요 :)
reviews.content_en: It's great because he eats well and I love that it comes in individual portions :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 배송도빠르고 잘먹어서 재주문했어요 ^^
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and he loves eating it, so I reordered ^^

reviews.content: 본 리뷰는 바잇미 서포터즈 바잇미식가의 SNS 포토 후기 입니다. (출처: @mong__eeeee )
reviews.content_en: This review is a photo post from BITE ME supporter BITE ME Foodie on SNS. (Source: @mong__eeeee)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 맛있는 냄새나요 진짜 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: It smells delicious and he really loves it

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 솔직히 냄새는 괴로운데ㅋ 그런만큼 구석에 숨기고 찾기놀이하면 유독 잘 찾습니다ㅋㅋ 첨가물 알러지가 있는 울 댕이에게 안심하고 먹일수 있는 몇안되는 간식입니다. 좋은 상품 만들어주셔서 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: Honestly the smell is a bit rough lol but because of that, when I hide it and do a search game, he finds it super well haha It's one of the few treats I can safely give to my pup who has allergies to additives. Thank you for making such a great product

reviews.content: 본 리뷰는 바잇미 서포터즈 바잇미식가의 SNS 포토 후기 입니다. (출처: @ho._.ddeok)
reviews.content_en: This review is a photo post from BITE ME supporter BITE ME Foodie on SNS. (Source: @ho._.ddeok)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 배송도빠르고 넘 잘먹어요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and he eats it so well

reviews.content: 본 리뷰는 바잇미 서포터즈 바잇미식가의 SNS 포토 후기 입니다. (출처: @__bamtol )
